ddls:
CREATE TABLE "representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the representative */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party the representative belongs to */,
  "since" INTEGER /* Year the representative took office */,
  "residence" TEXT /* Residence of the representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the representative */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography or background information */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the representative */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the representative */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the representative */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the representative's profile image */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the representative (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_representatives_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviated name of the party */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Name of the current leader of the party */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* URL of the party's official website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description or manifesto of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative in the district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "geographical_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the district (e.g., coordinates, region) */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the district belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "geographical_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the county (e.g., coordinates, region) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "representative_counties" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county represented by the representative */,
  "representation_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the representative started representing the county */,
  "representation_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the representation ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id", "county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, representative, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "request_uri" TEXT /* URI of the request made by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the representative whose information was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES representatives ("representative_id")
)
